summary: PowerShell core logic is solid (proper CmdletBinding, error handling, type safety), but deliverable is incomplete and has critical security issues. Missing: ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 (Pester tests—required by workflow), fixtures/sample.json & fixtures/keep-latest.json (referenced by harness & workflow), .actrc (used in harness), and act-result.txt (required artifact). Unpinned action: actions/checkout@v4 should be pinned to SHA per security requirements. Harness hardcodes expected values (e.g., ExpectDeleted=3) without corresponding fixture data to verify correctness. Cannot execute as-is.
